meanings.definition: elaborate, as of theories and hypotheses
examples: Could you develop the ideas in your thesis

meanings.definition: come up with (an idea, plan, explanation, theory, or principle) after a mental effort
examples: excogitate a way to measure the speed of light

meanings.definition: put into words or an expression
examples: He formulated his concerns to the board of trustees

meanings.definition: devised; developed according to an orderly plan
examples: he had well formulated opinions on schooling
